title: cephaelis coriacea
intro: Cephaelis coriacea, also known as the Yellow Root or Coptis, is a perennial plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its root, which contains berberine, a compound with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cephaelis coriacea include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
